title: Marketplace Manager - GKB Opticals International Enterprises - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - GKB Opticals International Enterprises - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at GKB Opticals International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About GKB Opticals International Enterprises:
GKB Opticals International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GKB Opticals International Enterprises!
